meaning: adj.&n.抗(癫)痫的(药物),镇(癫)痫的(药剂)
examples: OBJECTIVE To search compounds which have antiepileptic activity.
With antiepileptic drug (AED) treatment, symptoms gradually resolved in all patients.
The purpose of this registry is to collect additional information about the safety of antiepileptic drugs during pregnancy.
Half were given antiepileptic drugs carbamazepine or valproate immediately, while the other half did not receive any treatment until they and their clinician agreed it was necessary.
